title: Fearsome Friends
description: Top a gift or mail this seasonal greetings card and pumpkin pin to a friend and spread the Halloween spirit.

images.alt: Fearsome Friends. A square, multicoloured greetings card with a design of framed Halloween monster portraits. Including a vampire, a bat, a witch, and a mummy, against a purple and pink striped background. A removable pumpkin badge is attached.

The image shows the square 'Fearsome Friends' card, with a multicoloured grid of monster portraits and a detachable pumpkin pin badge. It stands on a purple plinth against a deep purple background with distinct shadows.
